payload.raw_text: You guys make your way back to the Leaky Tap, heading up to your rooms, and eventually find yourselves falling to sleep. However, the distant thunder rolls continue to quake the muffled interior of the rooms you're at, the lightning strikes flashing through the rooms that have a respective window, and the heavy impacts causing you to wake up in the middle of the evening at times with a restless bit of sleep. A faint drip of wayward rain seems to have collected and found its way through the roof of Beau and Jester's room, and the pattering in the corner of this small, building puddle causes you to frustratingly go and collect it, find something to at least keep it from making that noise throughout the evening.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's pretty late evening, it's pushing on midnight, yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: You know what, never mind, I'll do it another day.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Should we go to sleep?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Let's go to sleep.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Sleep, yes.

payload.raw_text: Okay. Eventually, you all come to consciousness again, sore from the action of the previous day, but the daylight greets you, muddled as it is from the darkened grey raining skies that greet you. The thunderstorm is still passing through, and a quick glance out through the window into the main thoroughfare, you can see the streets are muddied, and in some places gathered into small pools and flooded puddles, but Yasha is gone.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You see her pull back a bit. Another flash, a nearby bolt causes the sky to light up. Yasha's unfazed, and her attention shifts back to the glass of the window again, a brief moment of trance-like attention before, "You should try to sleep."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: You all right?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: She gives a nod and sits back down, closes her eyes, still sitting in a meditative position on the ground.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I draw her lit up by the lightning and then I go to sleep.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. Eventually, you all come to consciousness again, sore from the action of the previous day, but the daylight greets you, muddled as it is from the darkened grey raining skies that greet you. The thunderstorm is still passing through, and a quick glance out through the window into the main thoroughfare, you can see the streets are muddied, and in some places gathered into small pools and flooded puddles, but Yasha is gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They really are rat balloons.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Little rat balloons, and one of them exploding with poison coming out of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see a hint of a smile at the edge of her lips, and she gives a nod. "That's pretty good. I could never draw."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No? Do you want me to draw you right now? I'll do it, okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see her pull back a bit. Another flash, a nearby bolt causes the sky to light up. Yasha's unfazed, and her attention shifts back to the glass of the window again, a brief moment of trance-like attention before, "You should try to sleep."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She gives a nod and sits back down, closes her eyes, still sitting in a meditative position on the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I draw her lit up by the lightning and then I go to sleep.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It'll take about a day for them to finish the work on it, and it will run you about two silver.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I grab my Mariner's studded leather armor out of my room and bring it with?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Along the way, can I look for a tailor?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure! Make an investigation check. What kind of tailor are you looking for, a standard clothing tailor?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking balls. Seven. Someone who can sew me a custom coat, a cloak, or add a lining to something like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I could take you back to where I bought this cloak yesterday, if you want to go there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It won't take terribly long. It takes you a little longer. Although if you're going to the same place he's already been to, then it completely circumvents that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do they do custom there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You go and inquire. They do custom work, but it takes a little bit of time. It's a little pricier as opposed to buying one off the rack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's fine.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the two begin to look over, one of them is inspecting the quality of the armor while the other one closes his eyes and, as he begins to focus, you watch as this faint little flash emanates from the armor, briefly. He goes, "Oh, yeah, no; that there is a pretty simple enchantment right there. There are limitations based on the strength of the enchantment and how recently it's been applied to the equipment involved. But since this is a simple enchantment it is something possible to translocate onto a similar piece of equipment. It is a bit-- there is a cost to it should you be willing to pay for the service, but we can probably do that for you, yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Attractive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's just a pleasant, jolly individual who is massive in size, even with a slight hunch around the shoulders and back, stands a full seven feet, probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If it's all right, I'm going to peruse a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh yeah, no worries. Just be wary of anything you're planning to touch over there. Oh, and you, you're just an adorable little friend, there."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, it's nice to see you again, Mr. Sol.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'll let Fjord finish. But I have a request as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, we're going to go ahead and take those in the order they've been received. So if you could respectfully have a moment to yourself there. We'll help you as soon as we can. Thank you." He turns back around, and goes back to you--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nott, hands in your pockets, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't worry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He comes back into the chamber. "So to have this enchantment transferred over, it's only going to cost you about 80 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there any chance you could tell me how much it might cost?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hold on just a second." He goes in the back room and you hear these two muffled (muffled conversation).

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's really very nice and accommodating.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Extremely accommodating.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Knowledgeable, too, about all sorts of things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (muted laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All of them.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I don't know. I'll be right back." He goes in the back room again. (muted conversation) Comes back out. "Pumat Prime there says that for the process of research and development, should it be successful, development of the object, it'll probably be about two weeks of time of enchantment and the cost of the overall pouch will probably run you 200-250 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, with the charge on it. I think the total cost was a little over 1,000 gold. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We got a good discount. That glaive was really nice, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was a few hundred at least. I don't have the card in front of me. "Yeah, I--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have the card, but it doesn't say the cost. Ooh, it does, 1,350! Fuck! Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm okay, then. That's fine. I don't need-- I thought that they could be broken up and sold in little sets.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean, we could look into possibly devolving a small-based enchantment like that. I mean, research and development of that does take a while. You'd have to fund the endeavor. The good news is, when it's done you'd be the first to have an original Enchanter Pumat Sol pocket cozy pouch." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How much would that endeavor cost me?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, I guarantee with enough positive reinforcement, with enough friendship attained with certain members like I have developed over many years of hard work and providing services, perhaps one day you too could be the fine owner of three other versions of your tiny self."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you look over there." He points on the wall, you see a framed symbol: three diamond shards that all point to the center in a flux capacitor-like design. He goes, "I'm actually an annex of the Cerberus Assembly. So I get certain favors and I do things for them. I provide them, occasionally, with my capabilities and some enchanted objects, and in return they were kind enough to provide me with, well me, and him, and him."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So the Cerberus Assembly is that powerful with magic?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They're about the most powerful you find in the Empire, yeah. So me and my brothers here are actually, technically, we're a Simulacrum."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. That's fascinating.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But you know, we do what we can."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If someone were to want someone with that sort of magical power, you could not provide that, but the Cerberus Assembly could?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "It'll take about an hour to transfer this here enchantment for you. So be patient and come back in about 60 minutes. Should be ready to go."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Get it, get it, boy. 12, It's not terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I respect your candor. I see that you have a keen mind for business relationships. However, I do have to turn a profit. So I can't do much for you there, my apologies."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I understand. Healing potions were how much again? 70 gold?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, those were 50 gold apiece."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 50 gold. Wow, I got to work on my fucking memory. Great, I will take a healing potion and the enchantment transfer, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Fair enough. That will will run you 100 and--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "30 gold pieces, that's correct. There's your healing potion. You get your basic one right there."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, thank you.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Not going to lie, really appreciative to have, just here in a few days, returning customers willing to spend fine, hard-earned gold on some finely crafted and enchanted objects."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is this like, if I'm healing him, does he still get the double hit points?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Just when it's doing hit dice."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got to attune to it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wound closure? You cut yourself all the time, that would be very useful.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They tend to sort of heal themselves, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it reusable?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is quite nice, oh yeah. You know what? I think I'm going to treat myself, I'm going to take it. I feel like I've earned something, we've had a good run of it, and I have never spent this much money on anything in my life.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I mean, we've got some good momentum right now, right? What could possibly happen?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You wait the better part of an hour, are able to retrieve your armor, and indeed you now have the Mariner's armor enchantment on your breastplate.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But they might be a bit more open-minded to people sharing in that knowledge if they were the right type of person, say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Could very well be! They've been very kind to me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm glad to hear that. Nott? Molly? You have everything you need?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I've been looking in the little mirror, trying to get the height right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you want to bring the mirror with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I was joking.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right. Fine. This is good. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll probably be back in like a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll be back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, we'll be here. All four of us."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Goodbye, Pumats Sol.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Pleasure to meet you, little goblin lady!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Give Pumat Prime our best.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I will. Right now." He goes in the back room as the other two are still focusing on your armor. As you leave the two that are focusing go, "Thank you!" "Thank you!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Yeah, you'll have to wait the moment. About 20, 25 minutes, we'll have a fresh one for you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're in the mood for some bear claws, the kind they have in Nicodranas. Have you heard of these? Do you have them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We have bear claws. I don't know if we have any Nicodranas bear claws?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll take the bear claws, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and then we can compare and let you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "As far as I know the only major difference is they load it up with cinnamon--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's exactly what I was going to say! Cinnamon, yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We can do that. That'll be done. How many would you like?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Probably ten bear claws. Also do you have any hot freshly baked bread?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That we do as well. Of course."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will take a large loaf of hot bread, fresh out of the oven, please.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. "It's been banned for the past 15 years, but I do have a couple of reclaimed copies of Courting of the Crick, if you'd be interested."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sex and history.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She leans in for a moment and gives you a look. "Follow me." She leads you both to the back. She plucks a copy of Tusk Love.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a guy in an Abraham Lincoln costume, just whacking it. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm following, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Four score--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Define 'historical.' What are your interests?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I like historical fiction. I don't like shallow smut. I like to learn something while I'm being titillated, I suppose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: My shirt's gone back up. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You made me do this, Liam.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I love how many book titles you have.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Edubation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Edubation?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (straining) A squared plus B squared equals C squared!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have rolled a zwanzig, that is twenty.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, because it's--" and the voice stays very hushed, and she adjusts her glasses, the closer she gets "--because it is technically not supposed to be here, it's a bit pricier. That one runs you about 15 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm following, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Four score--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Define 'historical.' What are your interests?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I like historical fiction. I don't like shallow smut. I like to learn something while I'm being titillated, I suppose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: My shirt's gone back up. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You made me do this, Liam.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I love how many book titles you have.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Edubation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Edubation?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (straining) A squared plus B squared equals C squared!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have rolled a zwanzig, that is twenty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. "It's been banned for the past 15 years, but I do have a couple of reclaimed copies of Courting of the Crick, if you'd be interested."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Courting of the Crick.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm very much interested, in this and other books as well, but we will start with (whispers) the Courting of the Crick.

payload.raw_text: "I need to go." He pushes past you, and as he begins to exit the chamber, he goes, "I'm all right, I'm good, thank you this time, good bye," and darts out into the rain.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Ooh, Shallow Breaths, that's a good one.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: As the guy turns around, you can see him. He's mid to late thirties, you would expect, dark hair slicked back, the hairline pulling back a bit, male pattern baldness-style, human, and as soon he whips around: "Oh, I'm just perusing."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's not one of your favorites?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "I don't know, I've not read it, I couldn't tell you."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: What's your name?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I think it's rare that I meet people that are interested in seeing that type of niche. Thank you. I hope to have it ready for sale, hopefully within the next three or four months, so please do come by again."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They keep talking about the heft of his equipment. A lot of reference to his equipment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The gauge of his pipe?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's-- Do you--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Do you like it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, do I.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! I was thinking of Fjord as I was trying to be nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you were doing it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All her hopes and dreams.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's cocked, right? Okay, thank you. 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's like, "Oh good! I'm so glad you like it."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know, there seems to be a lot of machinery knowledge and, like, heavy machinery knowledge. Was that also an interest of yours?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, well there was a family background, yes. Before I took up writing."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Man, I've never seen engineering and-- combined!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: If you want to take the time to read it, either now or another time, I can give you more information, but scanning through, you don't see anything that catches your eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to flip through it. Does anything catch my eye based on what I know?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, do you want to sit and read it, like full? If you skim through it, you see pages, like some of it smutty, some of it seems boring.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You know, the thing is, places like that are like yard sales. 99% of the time, there is nothing but broken crap. But once, and I pat the book in one of my holsters, I found something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that the one I drew the dick in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you draw the dick on the Friends spell? You did it? That's the one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah I found that in a porn shop.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really? Are there pawn shops here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Porn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A porn shop?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Hidden.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know, this reminds me of the stuff that I used to read back in school.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You read porn in school?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, like all the history stuff. It feels like a bored monk wrote this. A real bored monk.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point, it's early afternoon. Is there anything you wish to do with your day? Any place you wish to go? Anybody you wish to talk to? What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys meet up back at The Leaky Tap with the rest of your party. You have already retrieved your freshly transposed enchantment on your breastplate. You guys gather once again in the tavern to consolidate your plans for the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I pull Molly aside? Hey, I wanted to ask you. When you stopped Nott from rifling through my shit last night, what was she looking for?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I didn't think to ask. Honestly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She wasn't grabbing for anything in particular?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not that I remember.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She going through your stuff too or just mine?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, no, not my stuff. That'd be ridiculous. My stuff's worthless.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just can't help herself, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, you know. Some people have needs. It happens. Just keep an eye on your things and make sure you always know how much money is in your purse.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There is some elements of cloth on there but it's been down here long enough to decompose to a mostly skeletal state. So it was probably here a long time ago, and it was pressed up into this corner and barrels were pushed up against it to keep it out of sight. Probably the reason it hasn't been found until now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the only one you find.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hang on, no one's around, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not at the moment, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pull out my adventurer's kit and light a torch, because fuck this darkvision shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you get a torch situated. It lights up, the room's brighter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No one knows we're down here, right? The door's closed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm going to leave because we're all three down here and go back up to the top and keep an eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Do we see anything else weird? More dead bodies, anything like that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No more dead bodies. Even this one you find is mostly like it was stuffed behind some of the barrels.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I tell how it died?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not good. Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Died of a broken heart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's just a skeleton.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No clothes?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We still have a few hours until sundown. Do you guys want to wait until the evening comes about? You can.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to establish some sort of, like, if you get in trouble is there a way to alert us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin? I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not really, because if Caleb's going to be down there with us-- I think, if we start screaming or you hear a ruckus--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If I'm with you, I can cast Message and alert our friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: See, down there I'm not so worried.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's about people coming in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, well then I'll stay out and I'll Message you when--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, somebody outside The Leaky Tap, another person on the inside to run interference, because you can buy us a couple seconds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You can Message Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can Message any of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or any of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, couple layers, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Any other prep we should do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, let's do this.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the evening clocks in close to midnight and the majority of the patrons begin to dwindle and scatter into the night air, you watch as Ulog enters quietly, gives a nod of knowing towards the two of you, then, on his own, steps down into the cellar. About ten minutes or so later, you watch as Kara, the half-elf girl you had met before, enters, gives you a glance, but doesn't acknowledge anything, orders a drink, leans against the wall, then eventually disappears down into the cellar as well. Later on, you watch as Dolan, the human you had spoke with, that seemed to be the one spearheading this meeting before, enters with another human male. They both look back and forth, acknowledge you guys. The two of them eventually splinter off to different sides of the room, waiting. One, and a few minutes later, the other down into the cellar area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Would I be able to discern where the assassin entered into the city?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's not a detailed historical book.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's not like, "by the third lamppost, remove this brick." Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This book sucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How far in are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Halfway, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long have you been working on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Couple hours.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the evening clocks in close to midnight and the majority of the patrons begin to dwindle and scatter into the night air, you watch as Ulog enters quietly, gives a nod of knowing towards the two of you, then, on his own, steps down into the cellar. About ten minutes or so later, you watch as Kara, the half-elf girl you had met before, enters, gives you a glance, but doesn't acknowledge anything, orders a drink, leans against the wall, then eventually disappears down into the cellar as well. Later on, you watch as Dolan, the human you had spoke with, that seemed to be the one spearheading this meeting before, enters with another human male. They both look back and forth, acknowledge you guys. The two of them eventually splinter off to different sides of the room, waiting. One, and a few minutes later, the other down into the cellar area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Would I be able to discern where the assassin entered into the city?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's not a detailed historical book.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's not like, "by the third lamppost, remove this brick." Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This book sucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How far in are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Halfway, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long have you been working on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Couple hours.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the evening clocks in close to midnight and the majority of the patrons begin to dwindle and scatter into the night air, you watch as Ulog enters quietly, gives a nod of knowing towards the two of you, then, on his own, steps down into the cellar. About ten minutes or so later, you watch as Kara, the half-elf girl you had met before, enters, gives you a glance, but doesn't acknowledge anything, orders a drink, leans against the wall, then eventually disappears down into the cellar as well. Later on, you watch as Dolan, the human you had spoke with, that seemed to be the one spearheading this meeting before, enters with another human male. They both look back and forth, acknowledge you guys. The two of them eventually splinter off to different sides of the room, waiting. One, and a few minutes later, the other down into the cellar area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Would I be able to discern where the assassin entered into the city?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's not a detailed historical book.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's not like, "by the third lamppost, remove this brick." Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This book sucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How far in are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Halfway, maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long have you been working on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Couple hours.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Just the four of them. Ulog has been-- and please, take no offense, we're just very careful-- keeping a very close eye on your activities since we last met. Bit of a scare as you entered the King's Hall, but I've heard that you've done a bit of business, unrelated. He speaks to your skill and we may have--" He looks nervously over, and Horris leans forward and goes, "We put two months into planning something, and it requires certain skill sets. Ulog, if you'd like to elaborate on this." The dwarf leans forward, pulls one of the lanterns closer, so all your faces brighten up just a bit. He turns the wick up a bit. "So we've intercepted some documents to Lord Sutan, one of the pretty faces and money grabbers over there in the Tri-Spire. Very politically connected. Apparently, he's been doing some business with a lowlife who's known in the more crown-based circles as one of those arrest-on-sight types. We believe this individual might be involved with The Myriad."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you enter, Dolan, the one who was leading before, sits up and goes, "I'm sorry-- what, um--?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm with my friends here, they've shared a bit of what is gone on here and I'm sympathetic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We haven't said too much, but we thought that he might be somebody you'd be interested in. Very clever, has no love for the Empire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A valuable asset. Good with... things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thought we could let you decide for yourself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They look to each other. "Have a seat."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, this is Dolan. Dolan, this is Caleb. Dolan, do you have a last name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They glance about. "Dolan Thrym."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thrym.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This is Horris Thrym, my partner." The man you saw enter earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The human male?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. "You know Kara and Ulog. What was your name again, you said?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Caleb. Thank you very much for meeting us."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it just the four of them?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "We tried to bring this information to the Lawmaster, Orentha, as she is a friend of Dolan's. However, we were intercepted by the High-Richter Prucine. She's about as corrupt as you get in the structure here in Zadash. She intercepted it, so that she delivered the information. I've heard nothing since. A couple of our members have been closely watched by the Crownsguard ever since. So we believe the High-Richter might be in on it. We've decided if we can somehow turn Lord Sutan against the High-Richter, and then expose them to the Lawmaster, they'll either be arrested or ousted from their positions. Which, one, would be victory for those who don't want to live under the claws of corruption in this city. And two, vacates the position of High-Richter. While Horris' practice may have been irrevocably damaged in the public eye, Dolan is a respected member of the society here. The locals at least. We believe that, if not the High-Richter himself, perhaps another position as things shift. It would behoove us--" Dolan puts his hand up and says, "It would be helpful to have at least one of us with an ear on the bead of the inner circle of how law is distributed within Zadash. While it is not my bailiwick, people seem to trust me, and I think that's the most important thing when taking an office. We've outlined a means of doing so. This is where we may need your help." Looks over to Kara, and the half-elf leans forward, "All right then, so, the current plan is to infiltrate the Lord Sutan's estate in the Tri-Spire, steal a copy of his wax seal, and his handwriting. After we forge a little of the correspondence to this unsavory individual who he was speaking to in this letter, we make a new one that writes about an assassination of the High-Richter, sealed, and signed by the Lord Sutan. Then, we infiltrate the home of the High-Richter, tear apart her living space, look like it's been tousled and tossed, like someone was seeking her while she was out for the night, at a local ball, which she'll be one night from here. Before she returns to find her place destroyed, we take this letter that we found and left it, hidden within her room. She finds the letter, brings it to the Lawmaster--" At this point, Ulog pipes in real fast, "Sorry, misunderstood. She doesn't get the letter. We deliver it ourselves to the Lawmaster. I don't trust her to take it."

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: (whispering)

payload.raw_text: At this point, you see Ulog make his way up and take a different table at the far corner. Then slowly, over the next 15 or so minutes, the other three exit the building.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: We should follow one of them.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, we don't know anything about this Dolan, this Horris' motives, or their agenda.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: We don't. While we're following them, perhaps we should try and find out what we can about this-- Lean in closer. Closer. This High-Richter Prucine.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Have the ones downstairs already left?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I don't know.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point, you see Ulog make his way up and take a different table at the far corner. Then slowly, over the next 15 or so minutes, the other three exit the building.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You were down there a really long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What is the benefit for us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, my takeaway is that they want to unseat some of the corrupted seats of power here in the city. If that's true, if there is an abuse of power, I'm all for removing those corrupted seats and putting people of worth in their place. I'm also not keen on taking the word of someone else without getting some evidence of our own.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I agree. Who knows? We can't be replacing someone corrupt with someone even worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should follow one of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we don't know anything about this Dolan, this Horris' motives, or their agenda.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We don't. While we're following them, perhaps we should try and find out what we can about this-- Lean in closer. Closer. This High-Richter Prucine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Have the ones downstairs already left?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: They're both men. The other one has his arm around the other and consoles him. Looking inside, you see it's a lot of books across the wall, you recognize there are some alchemical vials or other things that similar-type glass containers that can be utilized for that. Some dried roots are hanging from the wall. A lot of them appear to be medicinal in nature. After about 20 minutes or so of watching this, nothing strange catches your eye. It seems like two people winding down after a stressful day.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a hand on Beau's shoulder--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Nine!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be a thing forever.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah it should be every time. It's a rule.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: House rule.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's hard to hear. It's muffled; the wall's thick. It's not an argument, more of a lot of passionate conversation back and forth, some aggressive counter points to some sort of conversation. Eventually they both settle down with a bottle of wine, and you glance through the window. You see the one with the blond hair is sobbing into his arms at a table, and--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is a man?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point, he's probably left. It's been about an hour since you returned.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You can drop that, uh--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is who I am now. I'm sure it's run out by now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It lasts for an hour. It's probably run out by now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You know what we also need? I want some eyes on this High-Richter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I agree.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We should find out where she lives and how she treats people, see if the stories are true.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe tomorrow morning we can go spy on her house.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe we can even split a team, some people go and spy on the house, some people maybe go to the stockade, talk to the people she's locked up?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure. We might need to find out where she lives tonight, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm down for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I should have asked, but I forgot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, is Ulog still sitting at the other table?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It is about 1 00, 1 30 in the morning though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're new at this. We will address that tomorrow, for sure, before we proceed any further. You're right, there should be compensation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want the rest of us to go tomorrow, or do we still need to be look out?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I think we should all go. They should get a look at us as a whole, see who they're dealing with, just in case there's any shady shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we look like ourselves or other people?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What would you like to look like?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't care.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's at your discretion.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll decide on the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anybody feel like finding out where this High-Richter lives this evening?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it. How do we do that? (laughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can ask the owner of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a great idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Start there, why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Charm him, ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to go ask Claudia.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys met around midnight. So you can go try and wake up Claudia, if you'd like.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want the rest of us to go tomorrow, or do we still need to be look out?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, I think we should all go. They should get a look at us as a whole, see who they're dealing with, just in case there's any shady shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we look like ourselves or other people?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What would you like to look like?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't care.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's at your discretion.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll decide on the day.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anybody feel like finding out where this High-Richter lives this evening?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it. How do we do that? (laughing)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can ask the owner of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's a great idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Start there, why not?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Charm him, ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'm going to go ask Claudia.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is about 1 00, 1 30 in the morning though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's already that late.

payload.trigger_phrase: find yourselves to rest for the evening
payload.raw_text: You guys all eventually find yourselves to rest for the evening, awaking in the early morning. The chilled morning air comes through. The sky: still mostly gray, with patches of blue that poke through. No rain, it's still a little chilled. There's a bit of fog burning off by the time you awaken and look out your room's window. The morning is yours, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's so great.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's the most beautiful story, Beau!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can we go to sleep, now?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, the hard turn!

payload.raw_text: You guys all eventually find yourselves to rest for the evening, awaking in the early morning. The chilled morning air comes through. The sky: still mostly gray, with patches of blue that poke through. No rain, it's still a little chilled. There's a bit of fog burning off by the time you awaken and look out your room's window. The morning is yours, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's so great.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's the most beautiful story, Beau!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can we go to sleep, now?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, the hard turn!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys all eventually find yourselves to rest for the evening, awaking in the early morning. The chilled morning air comes through. The sky: still mostly gray, with patches of blue that poke through. No rain, it's still a little chilled. There's a bit of fog burning off by the time you awaken and look out your room's window. The morning is yours, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Man, that was more than I thought.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was very interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do you make of all that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't know. People are strange. Anyone who looks like us, you collect a few interesting enemies on the way, even at her age.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you praying over your swords tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Every night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. Can I join you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on, I'm just putting up the thread, come to bed. Come to bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you trust Fjord and Molly?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No. No, I don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me neither.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (poof) Alarm.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And then Oskar falls in love with her! And he carries her across a field, and they love each other so much!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's so great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's the most beautiful story, Beau!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can we go to sleep, now?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the hard turn!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's mid-morning. 10 00.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we even know the Baumbauchs are here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, they're in Trostenwald.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why would we be claiming something here? We need to be claiming from a family that's here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Timalt is from here, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Timalts are in Zadash.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They are in Zadash. They made a shipment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If the High-Richter doesn't say, "You're right, this is injustice, let's take it to the Lawmaster," then that Richter sucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She could be a lazy ass.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Regardless, it's just a story so we can get a bead on her, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if we say, "We're from the Timalt Company, they never paid our invoice, and they stole our puppies!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's not bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Puppy crime.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's how we would know that it was a bad guy. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So they stole from our invoice and they took all our Saint Bernard puppies.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and it is very sad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A moment passes. The crownsguard steps out of the way and you see emerge from the doorway an older female half-elf with dark red-purple hair that is short on the sides and brushed to one side, almost to a point. She has a gaunt, angular appearance, and is in the process of putting on ceremonial gold and white armor, similar to what you had seen on the Herald of the Hall, but a more elaborate design, and taken from the process of buckling together a brace. She walks up and goes, "All right, now who's here for their time with me?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's right. Wish us luck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I walk up to one of the two crownsguard outside the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I follow behind him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Super official.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Be careful, twinnie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is actually only one crownsguard at the front door, behind the gate. As you approach, arms crossed--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, please, look lively, unfortunately we've been sent here from the Lawmaster, we have some very urgent business with High-Richter Prucine. Please, if you wouldn't mind, would you fetch her?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glad you fixed that. The guard goes, "Oh, I-- Just a second," goes and opens the door, leaning inside. "High-Richter, you have guests out front." A voice goes, "Tell them to wait a moment."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like her already.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Yes, of course, I recall. It's been some time. What brings you to the front of my homestead in the middle of the day? I'm on my way to the Hall."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, High-Richter, it's so lovely to see you again. I know it's been quite a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have no idea who you are."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Brantley. We met-- must have been years ago now. You remember the Gala.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think it was a fundraiser, last time you were up for election?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! 14 plus four, 18.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I'm certain it has been."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Was that what you said?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I don't think those were my words at all. No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It was merely a few pennies for your time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A favor for a favor!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I mean certainly if you feel like doing justice on its own– I would like to see people taken care of that take care of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So long as it's not a bribe. Favors we can do."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, of course!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'll see what's possible. I'll ask around. I'll take these documents, if you don't mind, to see what can be mustered."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And, of course, we are always willing to repay in favors.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. There are all sides and types of favors that can be helpful to the Crown and those below."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Also, what do you think of puppies?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I think they're droll and must be fed to their larger kin. So are we done here?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I believe we are. Thank you for your time. We're most gracious.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Dolan goes, "All right, so, we've been looking for an opening, we've been trying to find out. We thought it was tonight, but they've pushed it back a day. There is a pre-harvest gala happening in the Tri-Spire tomorrow night. We figure this distraction would be enough to do any of the quiet infiltrations that we're attempting to accomplish, should you still be interested in coming with us. I know there was hesitation, and I don't want anyone to be coming into this that doesn't feel comfortable. To be honest, I want to be comfortable as well, and to know that we're going to bed with the right people. Are there any concerns? Any questions, worries?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Tonya? Pleasure. I'm Dolan, Dolan Thrym, this is Ulog." He sits there, he's like, "Hey." They both take a very long minute and look over you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey friend.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry, I'm just being careful."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're pretty ragtag, but they're both very good at what they do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm blue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I can see that."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: People like her make you uncomfortable?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You sure? What about people like him? People like him make you uncomfortable?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I mean only in the sense that they're fresh faces."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, just checking.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm giving a clear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ulog leans in, he's like, "I've watched them a bit, they're all friends, it's fine." Dolan goes, "All right."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) We've got to look for that motherfucker more often.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's fucking everywhere. He's been following us a lot. You said he was shifty, a little criminal--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You see Ulog and Dolan share a look and nod. A smile comes across Dolan's face. "Thank you. You won't regret it! I suppose, prepare whatever you'll need. We'll meet back in the cellar of The Leaky Tap tomorrow at sundown, and we'll take it from there." You can sense this excited nervousness to his voice that wasn't there before as he smiles.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But there's money involved, so there's incentive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have a little bit of time. We can still do a little bit of casing, maybe go talk to the Gentleman and see what he has to offer in between.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have a day, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right? A day and a night?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You have the rest of the day, the evening, and tomorrow night is apparently the Pre-Harvest Gala in the Tri-Spire.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: When we will strike! Jester, how do you feel?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think it sounds fun! Sure, why not.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh! okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we order up some puppies to celebrate? Just kidding.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've never eaten a dog. I feel like I would feel really weird about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Me neither.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We can call them back over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see Dolan and Ulog are having their drink at the bar. They walk up and sit down. "So can we count on you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One hundred percent.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Fancybottom name is one you can trust!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's all, supposedly, in one night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You dropped this money. (whispering) Where do we find Lord Sutan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't fucking know. His estate? He's not that far from where the gala's happening."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just take it and say thank you! (whispering) Okay, don't worry about it. (panting) They don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But the Tri-Spire.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He knows where he lives, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They know where he lives.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In the Tri-Spire?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In the Tri-Spire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So it's another dance through the sewer if we want to do that tonight, which we could do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Maybe that guard got his job back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He respawned.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think that ship has sailed, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure he's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well at dawn, we plan?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, we got to figure out where the Lord Sutan's estate is, get a wax seal, a writing, forge his hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to do all that during the gala?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At dawn, we plan. And that's where we'll pick up next week. Building up to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't fucking know. His estate? He's not that far from where the gala's happening."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just take it and say thank you! (whispering) Okay, don't worry about it. (panting) They don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But the Tri-Spire.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He knows where he lives, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They know where he lives.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In the Tri-Spire?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In the Tri-Spire.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So it's another dance through the sewer if we want to do that tonight, which we could do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Maybe that guard got his job back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He respawned.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think that ship has sailed, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure he's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well at dawn, we plan?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, we got to figure out where the Lord Sutan's estate is, get a wax seal, a writing, forge his hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're going to do all that during the gala?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's all, supposedly, in one night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough. Yeah, at dawn, we plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we plan.
